title: Hardware
description: CPU architecture, fetch-decode-execute cycle, memory types, storage, and performance factors.

title: Logical Operations
description: Boolean logic, AND/OR/NOT/XOR gates, truth tables, and their use in digital circuits.

title: Communication
description: Network types, topologies, protocols, packet switching, and wireless communication.

title: Organisation and Structure of Data
description: Binary, hexadecimal, data types, character encoding, graphics, sound, and compression.

title: System Software
description: Operating system functions, resource management, utility software, and user interfaces.

title: Principles of Programming
description: Variables, data types, operators, sequence, selection, iteration, and subroutines.

title: Software Engineering
description: SDLC phases, development models, testing strategies, and documentation.

title: Program Construction
description: Good programming practice, readability, maintainability, and modular design.

title: Security and Data Management
description: Threats to data, malware, social engineering, encryption, and data protection.

title: Ethical, Legal and Environmental Impacts
description: Impact of computing on society, relevant legislation, and environmental considerations.

title: Problem Solving
description: Decomposition, abstraction, pattern recognition, algorithms, and computational thinking.

title: Algorithms and Programming Constructs
description: Pseudocode, flowcharts, searching, sorting algorithms, and algorithm design.

title: Programming Languages
description: High and low-level languages, translators, compilers, interpreters, and assemblers.

title: Data Structures and Data Types
description: Arrays, records, files, and choosing appropriate data structures for a problem.

title: Security and Authentication
description: User authentication methods, access control, penetration testing, and network security.

title: Software Development (NEA Overview)
description: Overview of the non-exam assessment: problem analysis, design, development, testing, and evaluation.
